body.title: [sprint] Move scripts/critic.py -> devlab/claudecode/ beside critic_core.py
body.description:
**Problem:** scripts/critic.py is the /critic adversarial-analysis CLI; its shared core, critic_core.py, already lives in devlab/claudecode/. critic.py reaches it via `sys.path.insert(0, _REPO/'devlab'/'claudecode')` then `from critic_core import ...`. The CLI is dev-process tooling that belongs WITH its core, not floating in root scripts/. (It is NOT the runtime critic device unseen_university/devices/critic/ — that is a separate BaseDevice decision-evaluator; do not conflate.)
**Proposed shape:** git mv scripts/critic.py -> devlab/claudecode/critic.py. Now co-located with critic_core.py, the `sys.path.insert(.../devlab/claudecode)` hack is redundant — drop it and let the plain `from critic_core import ...` resolve as a sibling (devlab/claudecode is already on pytest pythonpath; for direct `python3 devlab/claudecode/critic.py` invocation the script's own dir is on sys.path[0], so the sibling import works). Verify no caller references the old `scripts/critic.py` path: the /critic skill (skills/critic/SKILL.md) already invokes critic_core.py directly, NOT scripts/critic.py, so the skill is unaffected — confirm with a grep and update any stray reference.
**Affected files:** scripts/critic.py -> devlab/claudecode/critic.py (move + drop sys.path hack); grep skills/, devlab/, bin/ for 'scripts/critic' and update any hit.
**Design rules:** one home (dev-tool beside its core in devlab/claudecode); homogeneity (CLI + core together); migrate->VERIFY->delete (confirm import resolves post-move before done).
**Scope boundary:** IN — relocate critic.py + fix its import + update any path references. OUT — the runtime critic device (untouched); critic_core.py (stays put); any behavior change to the critique logic.
**Test plan:** (1) `python3 devlab/claudecode/critic.py --help` runs (import of critic_core resolves from the new location). (2) `ls scripts/critic.py` -> absent. (3) `grep -rn 'scripts/critic' skills/ devlab/ bin/ unseen_university/` returns 0 (no stale path ref). (4) /critic skill smoke: `python3 devlab/claudecode/critic_core.py detect <a-symbol>` still works (skill path unchanged).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
